Version 2 of abagora.

Info

Development

  • Use sass --watch styles/scss/main.scss:styles/style.css to compile css into one file.
  • Run a local server with npm using npm start (shorthand for npx @11ty/eleventy --serve) in the command line.
  • Deployed to github pages.

Folder Structure

  1. _includes = general page layouts
  2. _site = the actual site that will be served to the internet
  3. images = attachments, but mostly images
  4. pages = individual pages that are not blog posts
  5. posts = markdown files that get transformed to HTML with the help of 11ty
  6. scripts = javascript
  7. styles = css styles

Resources

  • https://iconify.design/
  • Icon set: ionicons

Design Inspirations

  • https://stephango.com/

Coloring

  • https://stephango.com/flexoki
  • https://same.energy/search?q=subway+map+design
